scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:inference: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path 'inference/.venv/Scripts/python.exe') { & 'inference/.venv/Scripts/python.exe' -m uvicorn app:app --app-dir inference --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload } else { py -m uvicorn app:app --app-dir inference --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload }"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:inference" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
